name: Ha-Pijamot Be-Cafe Kar-Sol
overview: Kaffe Kar-Sol was a children's sitcom and a spin-off of the series The Pyjamas (HaPijamot). The show aired between 2007–2008 on the Children's Channel. The plot focuses on Ilan, Oded, and Kobi, who come straight from Tel Aviv to Rishon LeZion to help Yamit reopen her family’s failing business: "Kaffe Kar-Sol." The establishment is managed by Duvelle Spitz—one of Kobi Farhi's split personalities. Throughout the series, the Pyjamas gang works in the coffee shop owned by Yamit Sol’s uncle.
